questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 云中运行其实验工作负载。该公司有云支出预算。该公司的首席财务官担心每个部门的云支出责任。 CFO 希望在支出阈值达到预算的 60% 时收到通知。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run its experimental workloads in the AWS Cloud. The company has a budget for cloud spending. The company's CFO is concerned about cloud spending accountability for each department. The CFO wants to receive notification when the spending threshold reaches 60% of the budget. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS 资源上的成本分配标签来标记所有者。在 AWS 预算中创建使用预算。添加警报阈值，以便在支出超过预算的 60% 时接收通知。
A.en: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 预测来确定资源所有者。使用 AWS 成本异常检测在支出超过预算的 60% 时创建警报阈值通知。
B.en: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Use AWS Cost Anomaly Detection to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

C.zh: 使用 AWS 资源上的成本分配标签来标记所有者。使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 上的 AWS Support API 在支出超过预算的 60% 时创建警报阈值通知。
C.en: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Use AWS Support API on AWS Trusted Advisor to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 预测来确定资源所有者。在 AWS 预算中创建使用预算。添加警报阈值，以便在支出超过预算的 60% 时接收通知。
D.en: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：成本分配标签可以帮助标记资源所有者并实现部门级成本跟踪。正确： AWS Budgets 允许用户创建预算并设置警报阈值，以便在支出达到一定百分比时发送通知。该选项完全满足题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Cost allocation tags can help tag resource owners and enable department-level cost tracking. Correct: AWS Budgets allows users to create budgets and set alert thresholds to send notifications when spend reaches a certain percentage. This option fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Cost Explorer 主要用于分析和预测成本，而不是直接标记资源所有者。 Bug： AWS 成本异常检测用于检测异常支出模式，而不是设置预算警报。该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Cost Explorer is primarily used for analyzing and predicting costs, rather than directly tagging resource owners. Bug: AWS cost anomaly detection is used to detect unusual spending patterns instead of setting budget alerts. This option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Cost Explorer 主要用于分析和预测成本，而不是直接标记资源所有者。正确： AWS Budgets 允许用户创建预算并设置警报阈值。该选项部分满足了问题要求，但并不完全正确。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Cost Explorer is primarily used for analyzing and predicting costs, rather than directly tagging resource owners. Correct: AWS Budgets allows users to create budgets and set alert thresholds. This option partially satisfies the question requirement, but is not entirely correct.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS 资源上的成本分配标签来标记所有者。在 AWS 预算中创建使用预算。添加警报阈值，以便在支出超过预算的 60% 时接收通知。
answer_text.en: A. Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：成本分配标签可以帮助标记资源所有者并实现部门级成本跟踪。正确： AWS Budgets 允许用户创建预算并设置警报阈值，以便在支出达到一定百分比时发送通知。该选项完全满足题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cost allocation tags can help tag resource owners and enable department-level cost tracking. Correct: AWS Budgets allows users to create budgets and set alert thresholds to send notifications when spend reaches a certain percentage. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要在 AWS 上部署内部 Web 应用程序。该网络应用程序必须只能从公司办公室访问。该公司需要从互联网上下载 Web 应用程序的安全补丁。该公司已创建 VPC 并配置了与公司办公室的 AWS Site-to-Site VPN 连接。解决方案架构师必须为 Web 应用程序设计安全的架构。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy an internal web application on AWS. The web application must be accessible only from the company's office. The company needs to download security patches for the web application from the internet. The company has created a VPC and has configured an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection to the company's office. A solutions architect must design a secure architecture for the web application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在公共应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的公共子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例上部署 Web 应用程序。将互联网网关连接到 VPC。设置ALB安全组的入站源为0.0.0.0/0。
A.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to 0.0.0.0/0.

B.zh: 在内部应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的私有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例上部署 Web 应用程序。在公有子网中部署 NAT 网关。将互联网网关连接到 VPC。设置ALB安全组的入站源为公司办公网络网段。
B.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in public subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to the company's office network CIDR block.

C.zh: 在内部应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的公有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例上部署 Web 应用程序。在私有子网中部署 NAT 网关。将 互联网 网关连接到 VP 将 ALB 安全组的出站目的地设置到公司的办公网络 CIDR 块。
C.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in private subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPSet the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to the company's office network CIDR block.

D.zh: 在公共应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的私有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例上部署 Web 应用程序。将互联网网关连接到 VPC。设置ALB安全组的出方向为0.0.0.0/0。
D.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to 0.0.0.0/0.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：将EC2实例部署在公有子网中，会直接将实例暴露在互联网上，不符合“只能从公司办公室访问”的要求。 ALB的安全组入站源设置为0.0.0.0/0，允许所有源访问，进一步违反了安全要求。该选项不符合题目要求，是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Deploying an EC2 instance in a public subnet will directly expose the instance to the Internet, which does not meet the requirement of "can only be accessed from the company office". The ALB's security group inbound source is set to 0.0.0.0/0, allowing access from all sources, further violating security requirements. This option does not meet the requirements of the question and is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析：将EC2实例部署在私有子网中，保证实例不直接暴露在互联网上，满足安全要求。使用内部 ALB 可确保负载均衡器只能在内部访问，从而进一步提高安全性。通过NAT网关和互联网网关，私有子网中的实例可以安全地访问互联网并下载安全补丁。 ALB的安全组入站源设置为企业办公网段，保证只有企业网络可以访问应用程序。该选项完全符合题目要求，正确。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Deploy EC2 instances in private subnets to ensure that the instances are not directly exposed to the Internet and meet security requirements. Using an internal ALB further improves security by ensuring that the load balancer is only accessible internally. Through NAT gateway and Internet gateway, instances in the private subnet can securely access the Internet and download security patches. The inbound source of the security group of ALB is set to the enterprise office network segment to ensure that only the enterprise network can access the application. This option fully meets the question requirements and is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：将EC2实例部署在公有子网中，会直接将实例暴露在互联网上，不符合“只能从公司办公室访问”的要求。使用内部ALB是正确的，但将安全组的出站目标设置为公司办公网段并不能解决入站访问限制的问题。将 NAT 网关部署在私有子网中是错误的。它应该部署在公共子网中。该选项不符合题目要求，是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Deploying an EC2 instance in a public subnet will directly expose the instance to the Internet, which does not meet the requirement of "can only be accessed from the company office". Using the internal ALB is correct, but setting the outbound target of the security group to the company's office network segment does not solve the problem of inbound access restrictions. It is a mistake to deploy the NAT gateway in a private subnet. It should be deployed in a public subnet. This option does not meet the requirements of the question and is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：将 EC2 实例部署在私有子网中是正确的，但使用公共 ALB 会将负载均衡器暴露到 互联网，这不满足“只能从公司办公室访问”的要求。将 ALB 的安全组出站目标设置为 0.0.0.0/0 没有任何意义，因为出站规则通常用于控制实例对外部资源的访问，而不是限制对源的访问。该选项不符合题目要求，是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Deploying the EC2 instances in a private subnet is correct, but using a public ALB exposes the load balancer to the Internet, which does not satisfy the "accessible only from the corporate office" requirement. Setting the ALB's security group outbound destination to 0.0.0.0/0 makes no sense because outbound rules are typically used to control instance access to external resources rather than restrict access to the source. This option does not meet the requirements of the question and is wrong.

answer_text.zh: B. 在内部应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的私有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例上部署 Web 应用程序。在公有子网中部署 NAT 网关。将互联网网关连接到 VPC。设置ALB安全组的入站源为公司办公网络网段。
answer_text.en: B. Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in public subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to the company's office network CIDR block.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析：将EC2实例部署在私有子网中，保证实例不直接暴露在互联网上，满足安全要求。使用内部 ALB 可确保负载均衡器只能在内部访问，从而进一步提高安全性。通过NAT网关和互联网网关，私有子网中的实例可以安全地访问互联网并下载安全补丁。 ALB的安全组入站源设置为企业办公网段，保证只有企业网络可以访问应用程序。该选项完全符合题目要求，正确。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Deploy EC2 instances in private subnets to ensure that the instances are not directly exposed to the Internet and meet security requirements. Using an internal ALB further improves security by ensuring that the load balancer is only accessible internally. Through NAT gateway and Internet gateway, instances in the private subnet can securely access the Internet and download security patches. The inbound source of the security group of ALB is set to the enterprise office network segment to ensure that only the enterprise network can access the application. This option fully meets the question requirements and is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的自定义应用程序中维护其会计记录。该公司需要将数据迁移到AWS托管服务以开发和维护应用程序数据。该解决方案必须需要最少的操作支持，并提供不可变的、可加密验证的数据更改日志。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company maintains its accounting records in a custom application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to migrate the data to an AWS managed service for development and maintenance of the application data. The solution must require minimal operational support and provide immutable, cryptographically verifiable logs of data changes. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 将记录从应用程序复制到 Amazon Redshift 集群中。
A.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Redshift cluster.

B.zh: 将记录从应用程序复制到 Amazon Neptune 集群中。
B.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Neptune cluster.

C.zh: 将记录从应用程序复制到 Amazon Timestream 数据库中。
C.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Timestream database.

D.zh: 将记录从应用程序复制到 Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) 分类账中。
D.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) ledger.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Redshift 是一种数据仓库服务，适合分析和查询大规模数据集。它不提供不可变的、经过加密验证的日志记录功能。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse service suitable for analyzing and querying large-scale data sets. It does not provide immutable, cryptographically verified logging capabilities. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Neptune 是一种图形数据库服务，适合处理具有复杂关系的图形数据。它不支持不可变的、经过加密验证的日志记录功能。该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Neptune is a graph database service suitable for processing graph data with complex relationships. It does not support immutable, cryptographically verified logging functionality. This option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Timestream 是一个适合处理时间序列数据的时间序列数据库。它不提供不可变的、经过加密验证的日志记录功能。该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Timestream is a time series database suitable for processing time series data. It does not provide immutable, cryptographically verified logging capabilities. This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon QLDB 是一种托管账本数据库，专门设计用于提供不可变、经过加密身份验证的日志记录功能。它完全满足问题要求，并且需要最少的操作支持。该选项是正确答案。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon QLDB is a managed ledger database specifically designed to provide immutable, cryptographically authenticated logging capabilities. It fully meets the problem requirements and requires minimal operational support. This option is the correct answer.

answer_text.zh: D. 将记录从应用程序复制到 Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) 分类账中。
answer_text.en: D. Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) ledger.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon QLDB 是一种托管账本数据库，专门设计用于提供不可变、经过加密身份验证的日志记录功能。它完全满足问题要求，并且需要最少的操作支持。该选项是正确答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon QLDB is a managed ledger database specifically designed to provide immutable, cryptographically authenticated logging capabilities. It fully meets the problem requirements and requires minimal operational support. This option is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司的营销数据从多个来源上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶。一系列数据准备作业汇总数据以进行报告。数据准备作业需要定期并行运行。稍后需要按特定顺序运行一些作业。该公司希望消除作业错误处理、重试逻辑和状态管理的运营开销。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company's marketing data is uploaded from multiple sources to an Amazon S3 bucket. A series of data preparation jobs aggregate the data for reporting. The data preparation jobs need to run at regular intervals in parallel. A few jobs need to run in a specific order later. The company wants to remove the operational overhead of job error handling, retry logic, and state management. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 数据上传到 S3 存储桶后，立即使用 AWS Lambda 函数处理数据。定期调用其他 Lambda 函数。
A.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to process the data as soon as the data is uploaded to the S3 bucket. Invoke other Lambda functions at regularly scheduled intervals.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Athena 处理数据。使用 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 在常规内部调用 Athena。
B.en: Use Amazon Athena to process the data. Use Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to invoke Athena on a regular internal.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Glue DataBrew 处理数据。使用 AWS Step Functions 状态机运行 DataBrew 数据准备作业。
C.en: Use AWS Glue DataBrew to process the data. Use an AWS Step Functions state machine to run the DataBrew data preparation jobs.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Data Pipeline 处理数据。安排数据管道在午夜处理一次数据。
D.en: Use AWS Data Pipeline to process the data. Schedule Data Pipeline to process the data once at midnight.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：虽然AWS Lambda可以处理数据上传事件并定期调用其他函数，但它不具备复杂的状态管理和工作流编排能力。需要额外的逻辑来处理错误、重试和任务排序。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Although AWS Lambda can handle data upload events and call other functions regularly, it does not have complex state management and workflow orchestration capabilities. Additional logic is required to handle errors, retries, and task sequencing.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： Amazon Athena 是一种交互式查询服务，适合查询和分析数据，但不适合复杂的工作流程编排和任务序列管理。 EventBridge Scheduler 仅提供简单的调度功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service that is suitable for querying and analyzing data, but is not suitable for complex workflow orchestration and task sequence management. EventBridge Scheduler only provides simple scheduling functionality.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： AWS Glue DataBrew 专为数据准备而设计， AWS Step Functions 提供强大的工作流编排功能，包括错误处理、重试逻辑和任务序列管理。该选项完全满足题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: AWS Glue DataBrew is designed for data preparation, and AWS Step Functions provides powerful workflow orchestration capabilities, including error handling, retry logic, and task sequence management. This option fully meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： AWS Data Pipeline 是一项较旧的服务。虽然可以用于数据处理，但其功能不如AWS Glue和Step Functions强大，并且不支持复杂的工作流编排和实时任务管理。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical Analysis: AWS Data Pipeline is an older service. Although it can be used for data processing, its functions are not as powerful as AWS Glue and Step Functions, and it does not support complex workflow orchestration and real-time task management.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS Glue DataBrew 处理数据。使用 AWS Step Functions 状态机运行 DataBrew 数据准备作业。
answer_text.en: C. Use AWS Glue DataBrew to process the data. Use an AWS Step Functions state machine to run the DataBrew data preparation jobs.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析： AWS Glue DataBrew 专为数据准备而设计， AWS Step Functions 提供强大的工作流编排功能，包括错误处理、重试逻辑和任务序列管理。该选项完全满足题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: AWS Glue DataBrew is designed for data preparation, and AWS Step Functions provides powerful workflow orchestration capabilities, including error handling, retry logic, and task sequence management. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师正在设计一个支付处理应用程序，该应用程序在跨多个可用区的私有子网中的 AWS Lambda 上运行。该应用程序使用多个 Lambda 函数，每天处理数百万笔交易。该架构必须确保应用程序不会处理重复支付。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a payment processing application that runs on AWS Lambda in private subnets across multiple Availability Zones. The application uses multiple Lambda functions and processes millions of transactions each day. The architecture must ensure that the application does not process duplicate payments. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Lambda 检索所有到期付款。将到期付款发布到 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用事件通知配置 S3 存储桶，以调用另一个 Lambda 函数来处理到期付款。
A.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket with an event notification to invoke another Lambda function to process the due payments.

B.zh: 使用 Lambda 检索所有到期付款。将到期付款发布到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置另一个 Lambda 函数来轮询 SQS 队列并处理到期付款。
B.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the SQS queue and to process the due payments.

C.zh: 使用 Lambda 检索所有到期付款。将到期付款发布到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列。配置另一个 Lambda 函数来轮询 FIFO 队列并处理到期付款。
C.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the FIFO queue and to process the due payments.

D.zh: 使用 Lambda 检索所有到期付款。将到期付款存储在 Amazon DynamoDB 表中。在 DynamoDB 表上配置流以调用另一个 Lambda 函数来处理到期付款。
D.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Store the due payments in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Configure streams on the DynamoDB table to invoke another Lambda function to process the due payments.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 存储桶经过重复数据删除和重复数据删除，以确保不重复的支付处理。错误：事件通知机制适合触发简单的任务，但不适合处理高频、复杂的事务处理场景。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 buckets are deduplicated and deduplicated to ensure non-duplicate payment processing. Error: The event notification mechanism is suitable for triggering simple tasks, but is not suitable for handling high-frequency and complex transaction processing scenarios.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon SQS 标准队列不保证请求的顺利处理或避免请求的重复处理。错误：对于支付处理场景，顺序查询和去重是关键需求，标准队列无法满足这些需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SQS standard queues do not guarantee smooth processing of requests or avoid duplicate processing of requests. Error: For payment processing scenarios, sequential query and deduplication are key requirements, and standard queues cannot meet these requirements.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon SQS FIFO 队列确保交易处理顺利，并提供重复数据删除功能，适合支付处理场景。正确： Lambda 可以轮询 FIFO 队列并处理交易，确保可靠且无重复的支付处理。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Amazon SQS FIFO queue ensures smooth processing of transactions and provides data deduplication, making it suitable for payment processing scenarios. Correct: Lambda can poll a FIFO queue and process transactions, ensuring reliable and duplication-free payment processing.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然DynamoDB流可以触发Lambda函数，但DynamoDB本身不具备重复数据删除和重复数据删除功能。错误： DynamoDB 更适合存储数据而不是用作队列。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although DynamoDB streams can trigger Lambda functions, DynamoDB itself does not have deduplication and deduplication capabilities. Error: DynamoDB is better suited for storing data than for use as a queue.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 Lambda 检索所有到期付款。将到期付款发布到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列。配置另一个 Lambda 函数来轮询 FIFO 队列并处理到期付款。
answer_text.en: C. Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the FIFO queue and to process the due payments.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (82%) D (18%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon SQS FIFO 队列确保交易处理顺利，并提供重复数据删除功能，适合支付处理场景。正确： Lambda 可以轮询 FIFO 队列并处理交易，确保可靠且无重复的支付处理。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (82%) D (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Amazon SQS FIFO queue ensures smooth processing of transactions and provides data deduplication, making it suitable for payment processing scenarios. Correct: Lambda can poll a FIFO queue and process transactions, ensuring reliable and duplication-free payment processing.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在其本地数据中心运行多个工作负载。该公司的数据中心扩展速度不够快，无法满足公司不断扩大的业务需求。该公司希望收集有关本地服务器和工作负载的使用情况和配置数据，以规划向 AWS 的迁移。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs multiple workloads in its on-premises data center. The company's data center cannot scale fast enough to meet the company's expanding business needs. The company wants to collect usage and configuration data about the on-premises servers and workloads to plan a migration to AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 AWS Migration Hub 中设置主 AWS 区域。使用 AWS Systems Manager 收集有关本地服务器的数据。
A.en: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Systems Manager to collect data about the on-premises servers.

B.zh: 在 AWS Migration Hub 中设置主 AWS 区域。使用 AWS Application Discovery Service 收集有关本地服务器的数据。
B.en: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Application Discovery Service to collect data about the on- premises servers.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 创建相关模板。使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 收集有关本地服务器的数据。
C.en: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Trusted Advisor to collect data about the on-premises servers.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 创建相关模板。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 收集有关本地服务器的数据。
D.en: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to collect data about the on-premises servers.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Systems Manager 主要用于管理和操作服务器（例如，运行命令、补丁管理等），并不是专门为收集与迁移相关的使用和配置数据而设计的。虽然可以通过 Systems Manager 的某些功能收集某些数据，但它并不是规划迁移的最佳工具。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Systems Manager is primarily used to manage and operate servers (e.g., run commands, patch management, etc.) and is not specifically designed to collect migration-related usage and configuration data. While some data can be collected through some features of Systems Manager, it is not the best tool for planning a migration.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Application Discovery Service 是一项专门设计用于收集本地服务器和工作负载的使用情况和配置数据的服务。它与AWS Migration Hub集成，可以帮助用户规划迁移到AWS的过程。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Application Discovery Service is a service specifically designed to collect usage and configuration data for on-premises servers and workloads. It is integrated with AWS Migration Hub and can help users plan the process of migrating to AWS.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 主要用于数据库迁移的架构转换，与收集服务器使用情况和配置数据无关。 AWS Trusted Advisor 是一种优化工具，用于检查 AWS 账户的最佳实践，而不是收集本地服务器数据。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) is primarily used for schema conversion for database migrations and has nothing to do with collecting server usage and configuration data. AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization tool that examines best practices for AWS accounts rather than collecting local server data.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 主要用于迁移数据库，而不是收集本地服务器使用情况和配置数据。 AWS SCT 和 AWS DMS 都与数据库迁移相关，与此问题所需的服务器数据收集不匹配。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) is primarily used to migrate databases rather than collect local server usage and configuration data. Both AWS SCT and AWS DMS are related to database migrations and do not match the server data collection required for this problem.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 AWS Migration Hub 中设置主 AWS 区域。使用 AWS Application Discovery Service 收集有关本地服务器的数据。
answer_text.en: B. Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Application Discovery Service to collect data about the on- premises servers.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Application Discovery Service 是一项专门设计用于收集本地服务器和工作负载的使用情况和配置数据的服务。它与AWS Migration Hub集成，可以帮助用户规划迁移到AWS的过程。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Application Discovery Service is a service specifically designed to collect usage and configuration data for on-premises servers and workloads. It is integrated with AWS Migration Hub and can help users plan the process of migrating to AWS.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中拥有一个已启用所有功能的组织。该公司要求任何现有或新 AWS 账户中的所有 API 调用和登录都必须经过审核。该公司需要一个托管解决方案来防止额外的工作并最大限度地降低成本。公司还需要了解任何 AWS 账户何时不符合 AWS 基础安全最佳实践 (FSBP) 标准。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company requires that all API calls and logins in any existing or new AWS account must be audited. The company needs a managed solution to prevent additional work and to minimize costs. The company also needs to know when any AWS account is not compliant with the AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standard. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在组织管理账户中部署 AWS Control Tower 环境。在环境中启用 AWS Security Hub 和 AWS Control Tower 账户工厂。
A.en: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in the Organizations management account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.

B.zh: 在专用组织成员账户中部署 AWS Control Tower 环境。在环境中启用 AWS Security Hub 和 AWS Control Tower 账户工厂。
B.en: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in a dedicated Organizations member account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate 构建多账户登陆区 (MALZ)。在 MALZ 中提交 RFC 以自助配置 Amazon GuardDuty。
C.en: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self-service provision Amazon GuardDuty in the MALZ.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate 构建多账户登陆区 (MALZ)。在 MALZ 中提交 RFC 以自助配置 AWS Security Hub。
D.en: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self-service provision AWS Security Hub in the MALZ.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Control Tower 是一项托管服务，可帮助公司快速设置和管理多账户环境，同时提供合规性检查和日志审核功能。正确：通过在组织的托管账户中部署 AWS Control Tower，您可以集中管理所有账户并减少运营开销。正确：启用 AWS Security Hub 自动检查是否符合 AWS 基础安全最佳实践 (FSBP) 标准。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Control Tower is a managed service that helps companies quickly set up and manage multi-account environments while providing compliance checks and log auditing capabilities. Correct: Deploying AWS Control Tower in your organization's managed accounts allows you to centrally manage all accounts and reduce operational overhead. Correct: Enable AWS Security Hub to automatically check for compliance with AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standards.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在专用成员账户中部署 AWS Control Tower 会增加管理复杂性，因为管理账户通常是集中管理的最佳选择。错误：此方法不满足“最小化运营开销”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Deploying AWS Control Tower in dedicated member accounts increases management complexity, since administrative accounts are often the best option for centralized management. Error: This approach does not meet the "minimize operational overhead" requirement.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 Amazon GuardDuty 提供威胁检测，但它不会直接检查是否符合 AWS 基础安全最佳实践 (FSBP) 标准。错误：使用AMS Accelerate会增加成本和运营开销，不满足“最小化成本和运营开销”的问题要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While Amazon GuardDuty provides threat detection, it does not directly check compliance with AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standards. Error: Using AMS Accelerate will increase costs and operational overhead, and does not meet the question requirement of "minimizing costs and operational overhead".

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 AWS Security Hub 可以检查 FSBP 合规性，但使用 AMS Accelerate 会增加成本和运营开销。错误： AMS Accelerate 的复杂性和成本不满足问题的“最小化成本和运营开销”要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While AWS Security Hub can check for FSBP compliance, using AMS Accelerate adds cost and operational overhead. Error: The complexity and cost of AMS Accelerate do not meet the "minimize cost and operational overhead" requirement of the problem.

answer_text.zh: A. 在组织管理账户中部署 AWS Control Tower 环境。在环境中启用 AWS Security Hub 和 AWS Control Tower 账户工厂。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in the Organizations management account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Control Tower 是一项托管服务，可帮助公司快速设置和管理多账户环境，同时提供合规性检查和日志审核功能。正确：通过在组织的托管账户中部署 AWS Control Tower，您可以集中管理所有账户并减少运营开销。正确：启用 AWS Security Hub 自动检查是否符合 AWS 基础安全最佳实践 (FSBP) 标准。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Control Tower is a managed service that helps companies quickly set up and manage multi-account environments while providing compliance checks and log auditing capabilities. Correct: Deploying AWS Control Tower in your organization's managed accounts allows you to centrally manage all accounts and reduce operational overhead. Correct: Enable AWS Security Hub to automatically check for compliance with AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standards.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 存储桶中以 Apache Parquet 格式存储了 10 TB 的日志文件。公司偶尔需要使用SQL来分析日志文件。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has stored 10 TB of log files in Apache Parquet format in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company occasionally needs to use SQL to analyze the log files. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 创建 Amazon Aurora MySQL 数据库。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 将数据从 S3 存储桶迁移到 Aurora。向 Aurora 数据库发出 SQL 语句。
A.en: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL database. Migrate the data from the S3 bucket into Aurora by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Issue SQL statements to the Aurora database.

B.zh: 创建 Amazon Redshift 集群。使用 Redshift Spectrum 直接对 S3 存储桶中的数据运行 SQL 语句。
B.en: Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Use Redshift Spectrum to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 创建 AWS Glue 爬网程序以存储 S3 存储桶中的表元数据并从中检索表元数据。使用 Amazon Athena 直接对 S3 存储桶中的数据运行 SQL 语句。
C.en: Create an AWS Glue crawler to store and retrieve table metadata from the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon EMR 集群。使用 Apache Spark SQL 直接对 S3 存储桶中的数据运行 SQL 语句。
D.en: Create an Amazon EMR cluster. Use Apache Spark SQL to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Aurora MySQL 是一种结构化数据库服务，适用于结构化数据存储和高性能事务处理。将 10 TB 的日志文件迁移到 Aurora 成本高昂，并且不适合偶尔的 SQL 分析需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Aurora MySQL is a structured database service suitable for structured data storage and high-performance transaction processing. Migrating 10 TB of log files to Aurora would be expensive and unsuitable for occasional SQL analysis needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Glue 爬虫可以自动生成表元数据， Amazon Athena 可以直接查询 S3 中存储的数据，无需额外的存储或计算资源。此选项成本最低，最适合偶尔的 SQL 分析需求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Glue crawlers can automatically generate table metadata, and Amazon Athena can directly query data stored in S3 without requiring additional storage or computing resources. This option is the lowest cost and best suited for occasional SQL analysis needs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon EMR 适用于大规模数据处理和复杂分析任务，但对于偶尔的 SQL 查询需求， EMR 的设置和运行成本较高，并且不如 Athena 划算。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EMR is suitable for large-scale data processing and complex analysis tasks, but for occasional SQL query needs, EMR is more expensive to set up and run, and is not as cost-effective as Athena.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建 AWS Glue 爬网程序以存储 S3 存储桶中的表元数据并从中检索表元数据。使用 Amazon Athena 直接对 S3 存储桶中的数据运行 SQL 语句。
answer_text.en: C. Create an AWS Glue crawler to store and retrieve table metadata from the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Glue 爬虫可以自动生成表元数据， Amazon Athena 可以直接查询 S3 中存储的数据，无需额外的存储或计算资源。此选项成本最低，最适合偶尔的 SQL 分析需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Glue crawlers can automatically generate table metadata, and Amazon Athena can directly query data stored in S3 without requiring additional storage or computing resources. This option is the lowest cost and best suited for occasional SQL analysis needs.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要一种解决方案来防止 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈部署声明中包含内联策略或“*”的 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 资源。该解决方案还必须禁止使用公共 IP 地址部署 Amazon EC2 实例。该公司在 AWS Organizations 的组织中启用了 AWS Control Tower。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs a solution to prevent AWS CloudFormation stacks from deploying AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) resources that include an inline policy or “*” in the statement. The solution must also prohibit deployment of Amazon EC2 instances with public IP addresses. The company has AWS Control Tower enabled in its organization in AWS Organizations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 主动控制来阻止部署具有公共 IP 地址和具有提升访问权限或“*”的内联策略的 EC2 实例。
A.en: Use AWS Control Tower proactive controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 检测控件阻止部署具有公共 IP 地址和具有提升访问权限或“*”的内联策略的 EC2 实例。
B.en: Use AWS Control Tower detective controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Config 创建 EC2 和 IAM 合规性规则。配置规则以运行 AWS Systems Manager 会话管理器自动化，以在资源不合规时删除该资源。
C.en: Use AWS Config to create rules for EC2 and IAM compliance. Configure the rules to run an AWS Systems Manager Session Manager automation to delete a resource when it is not compliant.

D.zh: 如果操作导致不合规，请使用服务控制策略 (SCP) 阻止 EC2 实例和 IAM 资源的操作。
D.en: Use a service control policy (SCP) to block actions for the EC2 instances and IAM resources if the actions lead to noncompliance.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Control Tower 的 Proactive Controls 可以在资源创建之前对其进行阻止，这满足了问题的要求。主动控制可以直接阻止不合规资源的部署，例如具有公共 IP 地址的 EC2 实例或包含“*”的 IAM 策略。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Control Tower's Proactive Controls can block resources before they are created, which meets the requirements of the question. Proactive controls can directly block the deployment of non-compliant resources, such as EC2 instances with public IP addresses or IAM policies containing "*".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Detective Controls 会在事后检测资源是否满足要求，而不是在创建资源之前阻止部署。题目要求的是防止资源部署，而不是事后检测，所以不符合要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Detective Controls detect whether a resource meets requirements after the fact rather than blocking deployment before the resource is created. The question requires preventing resource deployment, not post-detection, so it does not meet the requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Config 可以检测资源是否符合规则，但无法直接阻止资源的创建。虽然可以通过自动化删除不合规的资源，但这并不是防止资源部署的最佳实践。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Config can detect whether a resource complies with rules, but it cannot directly prevent the resource from being created. While it is possible to remove non-compliant resources through automation, this is not a best practice for preventing resource deployment.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： SCP 可以限制账户内的操作，但无法精细阻止特定资源（例如具有公共 IP 地址的 EC2 实例或包含“*”的 IAM 策略）的创建。问题所请求的功能更适合使用 AWS Control Tower 的主动控件。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SCP can restrict actions within an account, but it cannot granularly block the creation of specific resources (such as EC2 instances with public IP addresses or IAM policies containing "*"). The functionality requested by the question is better suited using AWS Control Tower's active controls.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Control Tower 主动控制来阻止部署具有公共 IP 地址和具有提升访问权限或“*”的内联策略的 EC2 实例。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Control Tower proactive controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (61%) D (39%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Control Tower 的 Proactive Controls 可以在资源创建之前对其进行阻止，这满足了问题的要求。主动控制可以直接阻止不合规资源的部署，例如具有公共 IP 地址的 EC2 实例或包含“*”的 IAM 策略。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (61%) D (39%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Control Tower's Proactive Controls can block resources before they are created, which meets the requirements of the question. Proactive controls can directly block the deployment of non-compliant resources, such as EC2 instances with public IP addresses or IAM policies containing "*".

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 云中托管的 Web 应用程序最近越来越受欢迎。该 Web 应用程序当前存在于单个公有子网中的单个 Amazon EC2 实例上。 Web应用程序已经无法满足网络流量增加的需求。该公司需要一种能够提供高可用性和可扩展性的解决方案，以满足不断增长的用户需求，而无需重写 Web 应用程序。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company's web application that is hosted in the AWS Cloud recently increased in popularity. The web application currently exists on a single Amazon EC2 instance in a single public subnet. The web application has not been able to meet the demand of the increased web traffic. The company needs a solution that will provide high availability and scalability to meet the increased user demand without rewriting the web application. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将 EC2 实例替换为更大的计算优化实例。
A.en: Replace the EC2 instance with a larger compute optimized instance.

B.zh: 在私有子网中配置 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 多个可用区。
B.en: Configure Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling with multiple Availability Zones in private subnets.

C.zh: 在公有子网中配置 NAT 网关来处理 Web 请求。
C.en: Configure a NAT gateway in a public subnet to handle web requests.

D.zh: 将 EC2 实例替换为更大的内存优化实例。
D.en: Replace the EC2 instance with a larger memory optimized instance.

E.zh: 在公有子网中配置应用程序负载均衡器以分配 Web 流量。
E.en: Configure an Application Load Balancer in a public subnet to distribute web traffic.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：切换到计算优化型实例只能提升单实例的计算性能，无法提供跨可用区的高可用或基于流量的自动伸缩。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Switching to compute-optimized instances can only improve the computing performance of a single instance and cannot provide cross-AZ high availability or automatic scaling based on traffic.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： EC2 Auto Scaling 可以根据流量需求动态调整实例数量，并通过跨多个可用区部署来实现高可用性。此选项满足高可用性和可扩展性要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: EC2 Auto Scaling can dynamically adjust the number of instances based on traffic demand and achieve high availability by deploying across multiple availability zones. This option addresses high availability and scalability requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： NAT 网关用于允许私有子网中的资源访问 互联网，而不是处理外部 Web 请求。该选项与问题要求无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A NAT gateway is used to allow resources in a private subnet to access the Internet, rather than handling external web requests. This option is not relevant to the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：切换实例类型仅改变单个实例的性能特征，不提供负载分配、跨AZ高可用、自动伸缩等功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Switching instance types only changes the performance characteristics of a single instance and does not provide load distribution, cross-AZ high availability, or automatic scaling.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因： Application Load Balancer distributes traffic to multiple instances for high availability and scalability. This option provides the required high availability and scalability.
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Application Load Balancer distributes traffic to multiple instances for high availability and scalability. This option provides the required high availability and scalability.

answer_text.zh: B. 在私有子网中配置 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 多个可用区。；E. 在公有子网中配置应用程序负载均衡器以分配 Web 流量。
answer_text.en: B. Configure Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling with multiple Availability Zones in private subnets.; E. Configure an Application Load Balancer in a public subnet to distribute web traffic.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： EC2 Auto Scaling 可以根据流量需求动态调整实例数量，并通过跨多个可用区部署来实现高可用性。此选项满足高可用性和可扩展性要求。； Application Load Balancer distributes traffic to multiple instances for high availability and scalability. This option provides the required high availability and scalability.
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: EC2 Auto Scaling can dynamically adjust the number of instances based on traffic demand and achieve high availability by deploying across multiple availability zones. This option addresses high availability and scalability requirements.; Application Load Balancer distributes traffic to multiple instances for high availability and scalability. This option provides the required high availability and scalability.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有使用环境变量的 AWS Lambda 函数。该公司不希望其开发人员看到明文的环境变量。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has AWS Lambda functions that use environment variables. The company does not want its developers to see environment variables in plaintext. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将代码部署到 Amazon EC2 实例，而不是使用 Lambda 函数。
A.en: Deploy code to Amazon EC2 instances instead of using Lambda functions.

B.zh: 在 Lambda 函数上配置 SSL 加密以使用 AWS CloudHSM 存储和加密环境变量。
B.en: Configure SSL encryption on the Lambda functions to use AWS CloudHSM to store and encrypt the environment variables.

C.zh: 在 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 中创建证书。配置 Lambda 函数以使用证书加密环境变量。
C.en: Create a certificate in AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). Configure the Lambda functions to use the certificate to encrypt the environment variables.

D.zh: 创建 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 密钥。在 Lambda 函数上启用加密帮助程序以使用 KMS 密钥来存储和加密环境变量。
D.en: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key. Enable encryption helpers on the Lambda functions to use the KMS key to store and encrypt the environment variables.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：将代码部署到EC2实例并不能解决环境指标的加密问题。 Environmental metrics for EC2 instances still require additional encryption and protection measures. Furthermore, this approach increases administrative complexity and is inconsistent with requirements.
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Deploying code to an EC2 instance does not solve the encryption problem of environment metrics. Environmental metrics for EC2 instances still require additional encryption and protection measures. Furthermore, this approach increases administrative complexity and is inconsistent with requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 AWS CloudHSM 可用于加密，但它不是 Lambda 环境变量加密的推荐解决方案。 SSL encryption is mainly used for transport layer security and is related to the storage encryption of environment variables.
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While AWS CloudHSM can be used for encryption, it is not a recommended solution for Lambda environment variable encryption. SSL encryption is mainly used for transport layer security and is related to the storage encryption of environment variables.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 主要用于管理 SSL/TLS 证书以保护网络数据，而不是用于加密 Lambda 环境变量。 ACM cannot be used directly to store or encrypt environment variables.
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) is primarily used to manage SSL/TLS certificates for protecting network data, not for encrypting Lambda environment variables. ACM cannot be used directly to store or encrypt environment variables.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS KMS is a service designed specifically for encryption and managing encryption. Lambda supports encrypting environment variables using KMS encryption.通过启用加密助手，开发者可以保证环境变量在存储和使用时是加密的，从而满足问题需求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS KMS is a service designed specifically for encryption and managing encryption. Lambda supports encrypting environment variables using KMS encryption. By enabling the encryption assistant through DAPI, developers can ensure that environment variables are encrypted when stored and used, thus meeting the problem requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 创建 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 密钥。在 Lambda 函数上启用加密帮助程序以使用 KMS 密钥来存储和加密环境变量。
answer_text.en: D. Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key. Enable encryption helpers on the Lambda functions to use the KMS key to store and encrypt the environment variables.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS KMS is a service designed specifically for encryption and managing encryption. Lambda supports encrypting environment variables using KMS encryption.通过启用加密助手，开发者可以保证环境变量在存储和使用时是加密的，从而满足问题需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS KMS is a service designed specifically for encryption and managing encryption. Lambda supports encrypting environment variables using KMS encryption. By enabling the encryption assistant through DAPI, developers can ensure that environment variables are encrypted when stored and used, thus meeting the problem requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家分析公司使用 Amazon VPC 来运行其多层服务。该公司希望使用 RESTful API 为数百万用户提供 Web 分析服务。用户必须使用身份验证服务进行验证才能访问 API。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？
question_text.en: An analytics company uses Amazon VPC to run its multi-tier services. The company wants to use RESTful APIs to offer a web analytics service to millions of users. Users must be verified by using an authentication service to access the APIs. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

A.zh: 配置 Amazon Cognito 用户池以进行用户身份验证。使用 Cognito 授权者实施 Amazon API Gateway REST API。
A.en: Configure an Amazon Cognito user pool for user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway REST APIs with a Cognito authorizer.

B.zh: 配置 Amazon Cognito 身份池以进行用户身份验证。使用 Cognito 授权者实施 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API。
B.en: Configure an Amazon Cognito identity pool for user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway HTTP APIs with a Cognito authorizer.

C.zh: 配置 AWS Lambda 函数来处理用户身份验证。使用 Lambda 授权者实施 Amazon API Gateway REST API。
C.en: Configure an AWS Lambda function to handle user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway REST APIs with a Lambda authorizer.

D.zh: 配置 IAM 用户来处理用户身份验证。使用 IAM 授权者实施 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API。
D.en: Configure an IAM user to handle user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway HTTP APIs with an IAM authorizer.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： Amazon Cognito用户池专门用于用户身份验证，可以高效管理用户注册、登录身份和验证。 API Gateway REST API支持Cognito授权方，可以直接集成用户池进行认证，简化操作，提高效率。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Amazon Cognito user pool is specifically used for user authentication and can efficiently manage user registration, login identity, and verification. API Gateway REST API supports Cognito authorizer and can directly integrate user pools for authentication, simplifying operations and improving efficiency.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： Amazon Cognito身份池主要用于临时访问AWS资源，并不直接用于用户身份验证。 HTTP API supports Cognito authorizer, but REST API is more suitable for complex API scenarios.
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: The Amazon Cognito identity pool is mainly used for temporary access to AWS resources and is not directly used for user authentication. HTTP API supports Cognito authorizer, but REST API is more suitable for complex API scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：使用Lambda函数进行用户认证是可行的，但需要额外的开发和维护工作，增加了操作复杂度。 In contrast, Cognito user pool provides higher operating efficiency.
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: It is feasible to use Lambda functions for user authentication, but it requires additional development and maintenance work, increasing operational complexity. In contrast, Cognito user pool provides higher operating efficiency.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Technical analysis: IAM users are not suitable for large-scale user authentication scenarios. IAM authorizers are mainly used for access control between AWS services, not for the authentication of external users.
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: IAM users are not suitable for large-scale user authentication scenarios. IAM authorizers are mainly used for access control between AWS services, not for the authentication of external users.

answer_text.zh: A. 配置 Amazon Cognito 用户池以进行用户身份验证。使用 Cognito 授权者实施 Amazon API Gateway REST API。
answer_text.en: A. Configure an Amazon Cognito user pool for user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway REST APIs with a Cognito authorizer.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (88%) 13%。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析： Amazon Cognito用户池专门用于用户身份验证，可以高效管理用户注册、登录身份和验证。 API Gateway REST API支持Cognito授权方，可以直接集成用户池进行认证，简化操作，提高效率。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (88%) 13%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Amazon Cognito user pool is specifically used for user authentication and can efficiently manage user registration, login identity, and verification. API Gateway REST API supports Cognito authorizer and can directly integrate user pools for authentication, simplifying operations and improving efficiency.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司为客户开发了一款移动应用程序。该应用程序的数据很敏感，必须静态加密。该公司使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)。该公司需要一种解决方案来防止 KMS 密钥被意外删除。当用户尝试删除 KMS 密钥时，该解决方案必须使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 向管理员发送电子邮件通知。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a mobile app for customers. The app’s data is sensitive and must be encrypted at rest. The company uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). The company needs a solution that prevents the accidental deletion of KMS keys. The solution must use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send an email notification to administrators when a user attempts to delete a KMS key. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，该规则在用户尝试删除 KMS 密钥时做出反应。配置取消任何 KMS 密钥删除操作的 AWS Config 规则。添加 AWS Config 规则作为 EventBridge 规则的目标。创建通知管理员的 SNS 主题。
A.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when a user tries to delete a KMS key. Configure an AWS Config rule that cancels any deletion of a KMS key. Add the AWS Config rule as a target of the EventBridge rule. Create an SNS topic that notifies the administrators.

B.zh: 创建一个具有自定义逻辑的 AWS Lambda 函数以防止 KMS 密钥删除。创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch 警报，该警报在用户尝试删除 KMS 密钥时激活。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，该规则在执行 DeleteKey 操作时调用 Lambda 函数。创建 SNS 主题。配置 EventBridge 规则以发布通知管理员的 SNS 消息。
B.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that has custom logic to prevent KMS key deletion. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that is activated when a user tries to delete a KMS key. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes the Lambda function when the DeleteKey operation is performed. Create an SNS topic. Configure the EventBridge rule to publish an SNS message that notifies the administrators.

C.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，该规则在执行 KMS DeleteKey 操作时做出反应。配置规则以启动 AWS Systems Manager Automation Runbook。配置 Runbook 以取消删除 KMS 密钥。创建 SNS 主题。配置 EventBridge 规则以发布通知管理员的 SNS 消息。
C.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when the KMS DeleteKey operation is performed. Configure the rule to initiate an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Configure the runbook to cancel the deletion of the KMS key. Create an SNS topic. Configure the EventBridge rule to publish an SNS message that notifies the administrators.

D.zh: 创建 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪。配置跟踪以将日志传送到新的 Amazon CloudWatch 日志组。根据 CloudWatch 日志组的指标过滤器创建 CloudWatch 警报。配置警报以在执行 KMS DeleteKey 操作时使用 Amazon SNS 通知管理员。
D.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail. Configure the trail to deliver logs to a new Amazon CloudWatch log group. Create a CloudWatch alarm based on the metric filter for the CloudWatch log group. Configure the alarm to use Amazon SNS to notify the administrators when the KMS DeleteKey operation is performed.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然EventBridge可以捕获事件，但AWS Config规则无法直接取消KMS密钥的删除。 The logic of this option is relatively complex, and there is no clear mention of how to prevent the key from being deleted.
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although EventBridge can capture events, AWS Config rules cannot directly cancel the deletion of KMS keys. The logic of this option is relatively complex, and there is no clear mention of how to prevent the key from being deleted.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：由于需要编写和维护自定义逻辑，使用 Lambda 函数会增加额外的操作开销。 This option does not mention how to cancel the key deletion operation and only notify the administrator via SNS.
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using Lambda functions adds additional operational overhead because of the need to write and maintain custom logic. This option does not mention how to cancel the key deletion operation and only notify the administrator via SNS.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： EventBridge可以捕获DeleteKey操作事件。通过 AWS Systems Manager Automation 运行注册表会自动取消密钥删除操作。使用SNS通知管理员，满足通知需求。 This option is simple in design, has minimal running overhead, and meets the requirements of the problem.
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: EventBridge can capture DeleteKey operation events. Running the registry through AWS Systems Manager Automation automatically cancels the key deletion operation. Use SNS to notify administrators to meet notification needs. This option is simple in design, has minimal running overhead, and meets the requirements of the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudTrail 可以记住DeleteKey 操作，但无法直接阻止密钥删除。需要对 CloudWatch 组和警报进行额外配置，从而使操作变得复杂。该选项没有提及如何取消密钥删除操作，仅通过SNS通知管理员。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudTrail can remember DeleteKey operations but cannot prevent key deletion directly. Additional configuration of CloudWatch groups and alarms is required, complicating operations. This option does not mention how to cancel the key deletion operation and only notify the administrator via SNS.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，该规则在执行 KMS DeleteKey 操作时做出反应。配置规则以启动 AWS Systems Manager Automation Runbook。配置 Runbook 以取消删除 KMS 密钥。创建 SNS 主题。配置 EventBridge 规则以发布通知管理员的 SNS 消息。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when the KMS DeleteKey operation is performed. Configure the rule to initiate an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Configure the runbook to cancel the deletion of the KMS key. Create an SNS topic. Configure the EventBridge rule to publish an SNS message that notifies the administrators.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (86%) 14%。热门讨论与考点摘要： EventBridge可以捕获DeleteKey操作事件。通过 AWS Systems Manager Automation 运行注册表会自动取消密钥删除操作。使用SNS通知管理员，满足通知需求。 This option is simple in design, has minimal running overhead, and meets the requirements of the problem.
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (86%) 14%. Popular discussion and key point summary: EventBridge can capture DeleteKey operation events. Running the registry through AWS Systems Manager Automation automatically cancels the key deletion operation. Use SNS to notify administrators to meet notification needs. This option is simple in design, has minimal running overhead, and meets the requirements of the problem.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望分析并生成报告以跟踪其移动应用程序的使用情况。该应用程序很受欢迎，拥有全球用户群。该公司使用自定义报告构建程序来分析应用程序使用情况。该程序在每个月的最后一周生成多份报告。该程序只需不到 10 分钟即可生成每份报告。该公司很少在每月最后一周之外使用该程序生成报告。该公司希望在请求报告时在最短的时间内生成报告。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to analyze and generate reports to track the usage of its mobile app. The app is popular and has a global user base. The company uses a custom report building program to analyze application usage. The program generates multiple reports during the last week of each month. The program takes less than 10 minutes to produce each report. The company rarely uses the program to generate reports outside of the last week of each month The company wants to generate reports in the least amount of time when the reports are requested. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 按需型实例运行该程序。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则以在请求报告时启动 EC2 实例。在每个月的最后一周连续运行 EC2 实例。
A.en: Run the program by using Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the EC2 instances when reports are requested. Run the EC2 instances continuously during the last week of each month.

B.zh: 在 AWS Lambda 中运行该程序。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则以在请求报告时运行 Lambda 函数。
B.en: Run the program in AWS Lambda. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to run a Lambda function when reports are requested.

C.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 中运行该程序。安排 Amazon ECS 在请求报告时运行该程序。
C.en: Run the program in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Schedule Amazon ECS to run the program when reports are requested.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 竞价型实例运行该程序。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则以在请求报告时启动 EC2 实例。在每个月的最后一周连续运行 EC2 实例。
D.en: Run the program by using Amazon EC2 Spot Instances. Create an Amazon EventBndge rule to start the EC2 instances when reports are requested. Run the EC2 instances continuously during the last week of each month.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：性价比不高，因为EC2实例会持续运行一周，程序实际运行时间很短。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The price-performance ratio is not high, because the EC2 instance will continue to run for a week, and the actual running time of the program is very short.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Lambda functions run only when needed and take very little time to run (less than 10 minutes), so the cost is minimal.
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Lambda functions run only when needed and take very little time to run (less than 10 minutes), so the cost is minimal.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：与 Lambda 相比， ECS 设置起来更复杂，并且对于耗时的任务不如 Lambda 经济高效。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Compared to Lambda, ECS is more complex to set up and is not as cost-effective as Lambda for time-consuming tasks.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽管 竞价型实例的成本较低，但运行一周的成本效益仍然不如 Lambda。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Even though Spot Instances cost less, they are still not as cost-effective as Lambda to run for a week.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 AWS Lambda 中运行该程序。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则以在请求报告时运行 Lambda 函数。
answer_text.en: B. Run the program in AWS Lambda. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to run a Lambda function when reports are requested.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (82%) C (18%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Lambda functions run only when needed and take very little time to run (less than 10 minutes), so the cost is minimal.
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (82%) C (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Lambda functions run only when needed and take very little time to run (less than 10 minutes), so the cost is minimal.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 云中设计一个紧密耦合的高性能计算 (HPC) 环境。该公司需要包含优化 HPC 网络和存储环境的功能。哪种解决方案组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company is designing a tightly coupled high performance computing (HPC) environment in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to include features that will optimize the HPC environment for networking and storage. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在 AWS Global Accelerator 中创建加速器。为加速器配置自定义路由。
A.en: Create an accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Configure custom routing for the accelerator.

B.zh: 创建 Amazon FSx for Lustre 文件系统。使用临时存储配置文件系统。
B.en: Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. Configure the file system with scratch storage.

C.zh: 创建 Amazon CloudFront 分配。将查看器协议策略配置为 HTTP 和 HTTPS。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the viewer protocol policy to be HTTP and HTTPS.

D.zh: 启动 Amazon EC2 实例。将 Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 连接到实例。
D.en: Launch Amazon EC2 instances. Attach an Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) to the instances.

E.zh: 创建 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 部署来管理环境。
E.en: Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk deployment to manage the environment.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Global Accelerator 是一项全球流量管理服务，主要旨在优化跨区域的网络性能，并非专门为高性能计算而设计。不适合HPC环境中的内部网络优化。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Global Accelerator is a global traffic management service primarily designed to optimize network performance across regions and is not specifically designed for high-performance computing. Not suitable for internal network optimization in HPC environments.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon FSx for Lustre 是专为高性能计算而设计的文件系统，提供低延迟、高吞吐量的存储解决方案。使用临时存储可以满足 HPC 环境中快速存储的需求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed for high-performance computing, providing a low-latency, high-throughput storage solution. The need for fast storage in HPC environments can be met using temporary storage.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon CloudFront 是一项内容交付网络 (CDN) 服务，主要旨在优化内容交付，而不是针对 HPC 环境的内部网络或存储优化。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service primarily designed to optimize content delivery rather than internal network or storage optimization for HPC environments.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 是一种网络接口，专门设计用于支持高性能计算应用程序的低延迟、高吞吐量通信。它非常适合 HPC 环境。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) is a network interface specifically designed to support low-latency, high-throughput communication for high-performance computing applications. It is ideal for HPC environments.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Elastic Beanstalk 是针对 Web 应用程序和后端服务的应用程序部署和管理服务，而不是 HPC 环境的设计和优化。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Elastic Beanstalk is an application deployment and management service for web applications and backend services, not the design and optimization of HPC environments.

answer_text.zh: B. 创建 Amazon FSx for Lustre 文件系统。使用临时存储配置文件系统。；D. 启动 Amazon EC2 实例。将 Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 连接到实例。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. Configure the file system with scratch storage.; D. Launch Amazon EC2 instances. Attach an Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) to the instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon FSx for Lustre 是专为高性能计算而设计的文件系统，提供低延迟、高吞吐量的存储解决方案。使用临时存储可以满足 HPC 环境中快速存储的需求。； Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 是一种网络接口，专门设计用于支持高性能计算应用程序的低延迟、高吞吐量通信。它非常适合 HPC 环境。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed for high-performance computing, providing a low-latency, high-throughput storage solution. The need for fast storage in HPC environments can be met using temporary storage.; The Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) is a network interface specifically designed to support low-latency, high-throughput communication for high-performance computing applications. It is ideal for HPC environments.
